open_questions.autoencoder_vs_concatenation: Compare learned projection vs simple concat + padding
open_questions.optimal_analog_count: Green & Armstrong: >= 2. Test 3, 5, 10 for diversity vs noise
open_questions.extremization_alpha: Tetlock found 1.5 for humans. LLM agents may differ — calibrate
open_questions.tda_latency: Persistent homology on daily windows vs <200ms target
open_questions.mvrv_etf_era: Peak Z-scores diminishing. Track if predictive power persists
